issues.title: positive_sum must exclude negative numbers
issues.body:
TaskOne.positive_sum currently includes negatives in the total.

Spec: negatives are excluded. positive_sum([1, 2, 3, -5]) must return 6; positive_sum([-1, -2]) must return 0.

Acceptance: `ruby test/task_one_test.rb` passes. Change only lib/task_one.rb.
Done when: PR opened referencing this issue and CI is green.

issues.title: title_case must capitalize each word
issues.body:
TaskTwo.title_case currently downcases everything.

Spec: title-case each whitespace-separated word. title_case("hello WIDE world") must return "Hello Wide World".

Acceptance: `ruby test/task_two_test.rb` passes. Change only lib/task_two.rb.
Done when: PR opened referencing this issue and CI is green.

issues.title: inclusive_count is off by one
issues.body:
TaskThree.inclusive_count(3, 7) returns 4; the range is inclusive so it must return 5.

Acceptance: `ruby test/task_three_test.rb` passes. Change only lib/task_three.rb.
Done when: PR opened referencing this issue and CI is green.
